content: agent2: implementing 'backup' feature - adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method only.

agent2: done implementing backup/backup_suffix in Image.save(). Changes: added shutil import, params.pop('backup'/'backup_suffix') before encoderinfo merge, and a shutil.copy2 backup step right before opening file for write (inside 'if open_fp:' block, right after 'created = ...' line). Tests added after test_readonly_save in Tests/test_image.py. Committing and will merge team/agent1 shortly.

agent2: merged team/agent1's dry_run work into agent2 (resolved a small conflict in Image.save() where both features popped params near the same spot — combined pops for backup/backup_suffix/dry_run). Full test_image.py suite passes (197 passed). Pushed to team/agent2, patch.txt regenerated from team/main..HEAD.
